case_title: NATALIE AVILA ET AL VS. STEVE C PADIS

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 200.00 - SERVED JUN-19-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PADIS, STEVE C
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY AVILA, NATALIE AVILA, JESSE AS TO DEFENDANT PADIS, STEVE C ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-20-2015 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$NONE GIVEN) SERVED JUL-14-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PADIS, STEVE C

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFFS (2) WERE NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT BUT WAS REPRESENTED BY HIS WIFE ALEXIS PADIS. SHE SAID THE CASE WAS SETTLED BETWEEN THE PARTIES PRIOR TO THE HEARING DATE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
